name: OperationenKohorte
title: Operationen-Kohorte
description: SQL-on-FHIR ViewDefinition: Alle Senologie-Operationen mit Outcome. Spalten: patientId, procedureId, ops, art (BET/Mastektomie/SNB/ALND), datum, seite, outcome (R0/R1/R2), hauptoperateur.

where.path: meta.profile contains 'http://fhir.bih-charite.de/kds-senologie/StructureDefinition/senologie-operation' or meta.profile contains 'https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-onko/StructureDefinition/mii-pr-onko-mamma-operation' or meta.profile contains 'https://www.medizininformatik-initiative.de/fhir/ext/modul-onko/StructureDefinition/mii-pr-onko-operation' or code.coding.where(system='http://fhir.de/CodeSystem/bfarm/ops' and (code.startsWith('5-870') or code.startsWith('5-871') or code.startsWith('5-872') or code.startsWith('5-401') or code.startsWith('5-402'))).exists()

column.path: iif(code.coding.where(system='http://fhir.de/CodeSystem/bfarm/ops' and code.startsWith('5-870')).exists(), 'BET', iif(code.coding.where(system='http://fhir.de/CodeSystem/bfarm/ops' and (code.startsWith('5-871') or code.startsWith('5-872'))).exists(), 'Mastektomie', iif(code.coding.where(system='http://fhir.de/CodeSystem/bfarm/ops' and code.startsWith('5-401')).exists(), 'SNB', iif(code.coding.where(system='http://fhir.de/CodeSystem/bfarm/ops' and code.startsWith('5-402')).exists(), 'ALND', 'Sonstige'))))
column.name: art
column.description: OP-Art kategorisiert: BET | Mastektomie | SNB | ALND | Sonstige

column.path: iif(outcome.text.contains('R0') or outcome.coding.where(code='R0').exists(), 'R0', iif(outcome.text.contains('R1') or outcome.coding.where(code='R1').exists(), 'R1', iif(outcome.text.contains('R2') or outcome.coding.where(code='R2').exists(), 'R2', {})))
column.name: outcome
column.description: Resektionsstatus R0/R1/R2 (heuristisch aus outcome.text oder outcome.coding)
